findings.description: New BetaSkillsOperations (7 methods: create, createFromPackage, list, get, update, delete, download) introduced with no test file.
New BetaToolboxesOperations (8 methods: createVersion, get, list, update, delete, getVersion, listVersions, deleteVersion) introduced with no test file.
New BetaAgentsOperations (13 methods across sessions, session file I/O, managed identity blueprints) introduced with no test file.
Two new evaluator methods getCredentials and startPendingUpload added with no test coverage.
